briefdescription.para: Attempt login from the username/password controls.

detaileddescription.para: On success: destroys the login window and opens the dashboard. On failure: shows an error message inside the window.

briefdescription.para: Create all dashboard child controls. @req SWR-GUI-004.
Record a new vital signs reading from the vitals entry fields. @req SWR-GUI-004.
Admit a patient from the identity fields. @req SWR-GUI-004.

detaileddescription.para: Clear all session data and reset the input fields to default values.

memberdef.argsstring: (HDC hdc, const char *txt, int x, int y, int w, int h, HFONT font, COLORREF fg, UINT fmt)
memberdef.name: draw_text_ex

memberdef.argsstring: (HDC hdc, int x, int y, int w, int h, COLORREF c)
memberdef.name: fill_rect

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, int id, char *out, int len)
memberdef.name: get_txt

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, int id, const char *t, int x, int y, int w, int h)
memberdef.name: make_btn

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, int id, const char *t, int x, int y, int w, int h)
memberdef.name: make_edit

detaileddescription.para: Create a Segoe UI font at the requested point size.

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, const char *t, int x, int y, int w, int h)
memberdef.name: make_label

briefdescription.para: Paint the application header bar. @req SWR-GUI-002.
Paint the patient summary bar. @req SWR-GUI-003.
Paint the aggregate status banner. @req SWR-GUI-003.

memberdef.argsstring: (HDC hdc, int tx, int ty, int tw, int th, const char *label, const char *value, const char *unit, AlertLevel level)
memberdef.name: paint_tile

briefdescription.para: Paint one colour-coded vital sign tile.

detaileddescription.para: Each tile shows the parameter label, measured value + unit, and a colour-coded badge (NORMAL / WARNING / CRITICAL).

briefdescription.para: Paint the 2×2 vital sign tile grid. @req SWR-GUI-003.

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, int id, const char *label, float *out)
memberdef.name: parse_flt_field

memberdef.argsstring: (HWND p, int id, const char *label, int *out)
memberdef.name: parse_int_field

briefdescription.para: Refresh all dynamic dashboard content after any data change. @req SWR-GUI-003 @req SWR-GUI-004.

memberdef.argsstring: (HINSTANCE inst, HINSTANCE prev, LPSTR cmd, int show)
memberdef.name: WinMain

briefdescription.para: Win32 GUI entry point — Patient Vital Signs Monitor.

detaileddescription.para:
Presents a two-screen application:
Login screen — authenticates the clinician (SWR-GUI-001/002).
Dashboard — live monitoring display with colour-coded vital tiles, patient data entry and session history (SWR-GUI-003/004).
All memory is static (stack/global) — no heap allocation (SYS-012).
